textByHash.054248d3d39d41816152683a31274a66e92042be: Once you've caught it, bring some proof back to the hunter that sent you out in the first place. I'm sure they'll reward you for your time.
textByHash.0581ba3d1f25d6c5be909951960ccb196db165eb: I'm the primary record-keeper here. I organise all of our reports and write up anything important to be sent back to the city.
textByHash.0584d3806ea53f68f8ea7eb97be04da4e23b7958: Have you spoken to Wolf yet?
textByHash.0ffb3c35ef855794fce60c62f4e54d1b00ce253b: I wouldn't know what to do with myself out there, so I like to stay back here with my scrolls.
textByHash.11c4323ba201681bdc3e3351408c5d48c8104df9: Thanks for all your help. Have you checked in with the Guildmaster?
textByHash.1431c13be34abfffbb32f3b644ae434f7e9797ab: Why does that not surprise me? There's two things that man loves: that cat, and not filing in his reports correctly.
textByHash.2bdeab97990ad1bf61ea7c1951a181e490bd8afb: Our records suggest you've managed to complete rumours for us!
textByHash.33a06a0ee5ffb03f04035d6276ef9cf7c6acac1a: Thanks for all your help. Once you're done with the cat's bed, you might want to check in with Guildmaster Apatura.
textByHash.417b317ed8ecc4ddeeba2a83f73ef54c56265932: You'll have to be slightly more specific. There's always something that needs doing down here!
textByHash.43a151c8cf9da89e6602d2621b40ce3af0036b47: If anyone did, it would've been Wolf. She's always getting Fox into some kind of trouble.
textByHash.4721a16d084987b8b5c32d69428cd72f9ced95d2: Is that Fox's report? Thanks for bringing that back to us. How was he?
textByHash.761bce759245c72d7d6e6fa4a661035b17fa203d: Spare, you say? Hmmm.... I'm sure one of the other hunters could benefit from it if you're sure. If you hand it over to me, I can give you some spare supplies in return.
textByHash.8106bc9cdd75f93ed5c7f2ca7df4bd9184288341: Tetamo... Pitri needs to stop twittering with the birds. Yes, Gilman and I are concerned about Fox. He left quietly in the night, but we have no record of what he was doing.
textByHash.8369d7788991f2b2491fb82d6101bfe48eb9bb93: Indeed. There are all sorts of interesting creatures to hunt out there. Sometimes we get reports of a particularly unique example. When that happens, one of the hunters will set out to find it.
textByHash.8b70b59c64c9a6edaf84aa0b3fb8a923116b7f1d: Oh, hello there newcomer. I'm Guild Scribe Verity. Do you need me to explain the work we do here?
textByHash.978a6d5b08a1a8640b8cb268bc974685f5c04567: We try to, but it's like herding cats! We at least like to keep an eye on what they're hunting and point them in the right direction. It prevents us from losing track of too many creatures... or people.
textByHash.bb3b47686b913552cd45e6c95b6ab33ca5953383: If you do decide to take a job from any of the hunters, they'll tell you what type of creature they're looking into. Hunt that creature until you encounter the unique specimen.
textByHash.bfac0f9ba5519c9084a6985b6eb3556e2add29e6: Tetamo! Only he could get injured on an errand for a cat!
textByHash.cf2529c3cb8ba97ef079becf5a62a617904879ca: Would you like me to filter the rumour information a little more than I am right now?
textByHash.ea3d2f1d2c4beb805c6eb21b3ce412ad77f89b97: Now, what else can I do for you.
textByHash.f3bbae9eee8e279620efb05cdead22aae2a2b781: So it's nice and simple. Just chat to any of the hunters in here to help them out. They're all following reports that I've split up amongst them.
textByHash.f53460874b2780664e75a8b9c587d248d5a781a8: Good to hear. Once you're done with the cat's bed, you might want to check in with Guildmaster Apatura.
textByHash.f82e56b27c4e4ed35cb0e40e1dab3c4d96f475c9: Would you like me to filter the rumour information a little less than I am right now?
